title: Pharaoh's Lost Luggage
short_description: The airport lost the pharaoh's bags! Answer questions about the ancient world to win them back.
description: Pharaoh Tut-Tut is off on holiday to the afterlife, but the airport lost his luggage — and the only way to get it back is to answer questions about the ancient world! Journey through Ancient Egypt, Rome, Greece, China and Mesopotamia: what were the pyramids for, why did the Romans build aqueducts, where did the Olympic Games begin, and which volcano buried Pompeii? Every answer comes with a fun historical fact. Younger explorers tackle famous first facts; older ones unlock history-buff mode with the Parthenon, the Rosetta Stone and the Trojan Horse. A free online ancient-civilisations and world-history quiz for kids in grades 1–5, with speed and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the correct answer before the timer runs out.
